pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.annotation-api dependency to resolve missing annotations in Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in Java 11 as it was removed from the standard module.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use the 'release' flag for cross-compilation targeting Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compile error: default compiler settings may not target Java 11 correctly without explicit release configuration.
